list.name: sprint
list.query: SELECT period_key FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start DESC

panels.title: PRs (n)

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, n_pr AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Merged PRs in the selected sprint — the sample size behind every PR-based %. Below 20, percentages are greyed.

panels.title: Agent PRs (n)

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, n_agent_pr AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Agent PRs in the sprint — sample size for the Agent section.

panels.title: Months of data

targets.rawSql: SELECT count(*) FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'month'

panels.description: How many monthly rows exist — trend/ROI need ≥3.

panels.title: Usage %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, usage_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: AI users ÷ team size (capped at 100%). >100% raw input raises a data-quality alert instead of rendering.

panels.title: ETL Freshness

targets.rawSql: SELECT max(collected_at) FROM reporting.metric_counts WHERE project = 'TeacherZone'

panels.description: When the collector last wrote data for this project.

panels.title: Sprint Predictability

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, predictability_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Completed ÷ committed issues in the Jira sprint.

panels.title: Lead Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, lead_time_h AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Median hours from PR merge to next production deploy.

panels.title: Incidents

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, incidents AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Jira issues of type Incident created this sprint. Green 0, amber 1-2, red 3+.

panels.title: MTTR

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, mttr_h AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Mean time to resolve — hours from an incident being created to resolved. Lower is better.

panels.title: Rework %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, rework_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Share of merged PRs that revert or re-touch files changed in the prior 14 days. Lower is healthier.

panels.title: AI Net $ (latest month)

targets.rawSql: SELECT (w.ai_time_saved_h * 12) - COALESCE(t.value::numeric, 0) FROM reporting.metrics_wide w LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs t ON t.project = w.project AND t.period_key = w.period_key AND t.field = 'ai_tool_cost_monthly' WHERE w.project = 'TeacherZone' AND w.period_type = 'month' AND w.ai_time_saved_h IS NOT NULL ORDER BY w.period_key DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: Hours saved × $12/h blended rate − monthly AI tool cost (seats + API). Green when net-positive.

panels.title: AI Hours Saved

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, ai_time_saved_h AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Sum of per-ticket 'AI Time Saved' on issues done this sprint.

panels.title: Throughput / Engineer

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, throughput_per_engineer AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Tasks done ÷ active engineers — ROI supporting evidence.

panels.title: Savings vs Tool Cost by Month

targets.rawSql: SELECT w.period_start AS time, w.ai_time_saved_h * 12 AS "Savings $", t.value::numeric AS "Tool cost $" FROM reporting.metrics_wide w LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs t ON t.project = w.project AND t.period_key = w.period_key AND t.field = 'ai_tool_cost_monthly' WHERE w.project = 'TeacherZone' AND w.period_type = 'month' ORDER BY w.period_start

panels.description: Monthly AI hours saved × $12/h (Savings) vs the entered AI tool cost. Savings above cost = positive ROI.

panels.title: AI Tasks by Tool ($sprint)

targets.rawSql: SELECT replace(metric_key, 'ai_tasks_tool_', '') AS "Tool", value AS "Tasks" FROM reporting.metric_counts WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint' AND metric_key LIKE 'ai_tasks_tool_%' ORDER BY value DESC

panels.description: Which tool's licenses produce. From the Jira AI Tool field.

panels.title: Is AI work faster — and as good?
Lead Time — AI vs non-AI

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, lead_time_ai_h AS "AI PRs", lead_time_nonai_h AS "Non-AI PRs" FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Neutral comparison — AI being slower on some work is a legitimate finding (verification overhead), not an error.

panels.title: Hours to First Review — AI vs non-AI

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, first_review_ai_h AS "AI PRs", first_review_nonai_h AS "Non-AI PRs" FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Median hours from PR open to its first submitted review, by segment. A rising AI line can signal review-queue pressure from higher AI PR volume.

panels.title: PR Size (AI)

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, pr_size_ai AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Median lines changed (additions + deletions) per AI PR.

panels.title: PR Size (non-AI)

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, pr_size_nonai AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Median lines changed per non-AI PR — the comparison baseline for PR Size (AI).

panels.title: Review Rounds (AI)

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, review_rounds_ai AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Mean CHANGES_REQUESTED per AI PR — verification burden.

panels.title: Rework from AI %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, rework_from_ai_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Share of rework whose culprit PR was AI-labeled.

panels.title: AI PR Test %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, ai_pr_test_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: AI PRs touching test files. Maturity gate input.

panels.title: AI PR Review %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, CASE WHEN n_ai_pr < 20 THEN NULL ELSE ai_pr_review_pct END AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Share of AI PRs with a human approval. Gate for stages 3-4; target ~100%. Greyed when n<20 (too small to trust).

panels.title: Lead Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, lead_time_h AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Median hours from PR merge to next production deploy.

panels.title: Deploys / Week

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, deploys_per_week AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Production deploys ÷ weeks in the window. DORA throughput signal; higher is better.

panels.title: Change Failure Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, cfr_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Incidents per deploy (proxy). Target ≤15%.

panels.title: MTTR

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, mttr_h AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Mean hours from incident created to resolved. Lower is better.

panels.title: Sprint Predictability

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, predictability_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Completed ÷ committed issues in the Jira sprint. Higher = more reliable delivery.

panels.title: Overall Maturity (1-5)

targets.rawSql: SELECT overall FROM reporting.v_levels WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' ORDER BY quarter DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: A-E gated model: OVERALL = MIN(E-Governance, C-Quality, round(avg(A..E))). Computed in reporting.v_levels, identical to the Excel workbook.

panels.title: Agent PRs by Sprint

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, agent_prs_autonomous AS "Autonomous", agent_prs_human_fixed AS "Human-fixed" FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Merged agent PRs: shipped untouched (blue) vs needing human commits (gray).

panels.title: Autonomy %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, CASE WHEN n_agent_pr < 20 THEN NULL ELSE autonomy_pct END AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Agent PRs with zero human commits. L4 ≥30%, L5 ≥60%. Greyed when n<20 (too small to trust).

panels.title: Completion %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, agent_completion_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Agent PRs merged ÷ agent PRs opened.

panels.title: Intervention %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, human_intervention_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Agent PRs needing human commits. Lower is better.

panels.title: Agent Cycle Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, agent_cycle_h AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Median hours from agent PR opened to merged.

panels.title: AI Engineers / Week

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, ai_users_weekly_avg AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Distinct people using AI per week (PR + Jira proxy).

panels.title: Contributors

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, engineers_active AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Distinct engineers who merged a PR this sprint (bots excluded).

panels.title: Engineer Usage Rate

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, usage_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: AI engineers ÷ active contributors. Target ≥80%.

panels.title: AI PR %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, CASE WHEN n_pr < 20 THEN NULL ELSE ai_pr_pct END AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Merged PRs labeled ai-assisted. Framework: ≥30% = L3, >50% = L4. Greyed when n<20 (too small to trust).

panels.title: AI Task %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, ai_task_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Done Jira issues with any AI usage.

panels.title: Agent Task %

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, agent_task_pct AS value FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_start <= (SELECT period_start FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' AND period_key = '$sprint') ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Done Jira issues delegated to autonomous agents.

panels.title: AI Share of Work

targets.rawSql: SELECT period_start AS time, ai_pr_pct AS "AI PR %", ai_task_pct AS "AI Task %", agent_task_pct AS "Agent Task %" FROM reporting.v_metrics WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' AND period_type = 'sprint' ORDER BY period_start

panels.description: Trend of AI-labeled PRs, AI-usage Jira tasks, and agent tasks as a share of all work — adoption breadth over time.

panels.title: Monthly Record — auto + manual inputs

targets.rawSql: SELECT w.period_key AS "Month", round(w.ai_users_weekly_avg, 1) AS "AI Engineers/wk", w.engineers_active AS "Contributors", e.value::numeric AS "Team Size", round(w.usage_pct, 0) AS "Usage %", round(100.0 * w.ai_prs / NULLIF(w.total_prs, 0), 1) AS "AI PR %", w.total_tasks AS "Tasks", w.deploys AS "Deploys", round(w.ai_time_saved_h * 12, 0) AS "AI $ Saved", tc.value::numeric AS "Tool Cost $", round(100 * c.value::numeric, 0) AS "Coverage %", cb.value::numeric AS "Cost Baseline", ca.value::numeric AS "Cost Actual", round(100 * (cb.value::numeric - ca.value::numeric) / NULLIF(cb.value::numeric, 0), 0) AS "Cost Improvement %" FROM reporting.v_metrics w LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs e ON e.project = w.project AND e.period_key = w.period_key AND e.field = 'total_engineers' LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs tc ON tc.project = w.project AND tc.period_key = w.period_key AND tc.field = 'ai_tool_cost_monthly' LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs c ON c.project = w.project AND c.period_key = w.period_key AND c.field = 'coverage_ai' LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs cb ON cb.project = w.project AND cb.period_key = w.period_key AND cb.field = 'cost_baseline' LEFT JOIN reporting.manual_inputs ca ON ca.project = w.project AND ca.period_key = w.period_key AND ca.field = 'cost_actual' WHERE w.project = 'TeacherZone' AND w.period_type = 'month' ORDER BY w.period_key DESC

panels.description: Empty cells mean a manual input is missing — run the 'AI SDLC — Metrics Collection' workflow with manual_period=<month> (total_engineers, ai_tool_cost_monthly, coverage_ai, cost_baseline, cost_actual).

panels.title: Maturity — A–E Levels (latest quarter)

targets.rawSql: SELECT quarter AS "Quarter", lvl_a AS "A Adoption", lvl_b AS "B Delivery", lvl_c AS "C Quality ★", lvl_d AS "D Agent", lvl_e AS "E Governance ★", overall AS "OVERALL" FROM reporting.v_levels WHERE project = 'TeacherZone' ORDER BY quarter DESC LIMIT 1

panels.description: OVERALL = MIN(E-Governance, C-Quality, round(avg(A..E))). C and E are gates: a low governance or quality level caps the whole score. Source: reporting.v_levels (≡ Excel workbook).
